$comment: Canonical UI screen registry — the AI's map of the app's screens. Each screen maps to its route, the module it belongs to (module_key), a one-line purpose, and the AI action_keys reachable from it. Keep this in sync when adding a route (see doc/AI_READINESS.md). Ingested into the AI global corpus by src/services/ai/knowledge/codebase.js; also usable by the frontend for nav/breadcrumbs.

screens.title: Login
screens.purpose: White-label sign-in with 2FA challenge.

screens.title: Dashboard
screens.purpose: Landing overview / KPIs for the signed-in user.

screens.title: Users
screens.purpose: List and manage application users.

screens.title: Roles
screens.purpose: Define roles in the RBAC engine.

screens.title: Permission matrix
screens.purpose: Grant matrix editor: roles x modules x R/C/U/D/A.

screens.title: Capabilities
screens.purpose: Authority overlay (ISSUER/VALIDATOR/APPROVER/LINE_MANAGER).

screens.title: Scopes
screens.purpose: Entity/branch record-level scope tree.

screens.title: Field visibility
screens.purpose: Per-field confidentiality rules.

screens.title: Sessions
screens.purpose: Active sessions with remote kill.

screens.title: Audit ledger
screens.purpose: Immutable audit trail + soft-delete restore.

screens.title: Notifications
screens.purpose: In-app notifications incl. Watch-the-Watcher alerts.

screens.title: Workflows
screens.purpose: Universal Event Engine: event types, workflows, steps.

screens.title: Approvals
screens.purpose: Runtime approval queue for approvable events.

screens.title: Appearance
screens.purpose: White-label theming: colour, logo, display name.

screens.title: Settings
screens.purpose: Tenant configuration hub.

screens.title: Numbering schemes
screens.purpose: Configure per-document numbering (prefix, padding, reset).

screens.title: Bank accounts
screens.purpose: Company bank, cash and mobile-money accounts mapped to CoA codes.

screens.title: Payment gateways
screens.purpose: Per-tenant payment gateway providers and encrypted credentials.

screens.title: Scheduled reports
screens.purpose: Automated report delivery on a cadence to email recipients.

screens.title: API keys & secrets
screens.purpose: Encrypted, write-only third-party AI provider keys.

screens.title: Pipeline stages
screens.purpose: CRM opportunity pipeline stages (read-only).

screens.title: Vehicles
screens.purpose: Fleet registry: trucks, low-beds, company cars.

screens.title: Vehicle compliance
screens.purpose: Insurance & visite-technique expiry with renewal alerts.

screens.title: Work orders
screens.purpose: Preventive & corrective maintenance work orders.

screens.title: Dispatch
screens.purpose: Vehicle assignments with check-in/out and odometer.

screens.title: Fuel log
screens.purpose: Fuel purchases per vehicle.

screens.title: Driver licences
screens.purpose: Driver licences, class and expiry.

screens.title: Incidents
screens.purpose: Fleet incidents and insurance claims.

screens.title: Locations
screens.purpose: Warehouse slotting: zone/aisle/rack/bin/yard.

screens.title: Inventory
screens.purpose: Stock on hand, state machine and movement journal.

screens.title: Inbound / GRN
screens.purpose: Goods received notes and QA gate.

screens.title: Outbound
screens.purpose: Pick / pack / dispatch orders and lines.

screens.title: Equipment
screens.purpose: Handling equipment: forklifts, reach-stackers.

screens.title: Cycle counts
screens.purpose: Physical counts and discrepancies.

screens.title: Employees
screens.purpose: Human capital master — staff records HR, payroll and fleet build on.

screens.title: Vacancies
screens.purpose: Recruitment vacancies and applicant pipeline.

screens.title: Contracts
screens.purpose: HR contracts: offer, employment, confirmation, termination.

screens.title: Appraisals
screens.purpose: Performance appraisals against KPI targets.

screens.title: Attendance
screens.purpose: Clock-in/out logs with optional GPS.

screens.title: Leave & allowances
screens.purpose: Leave, salary-advance and mission requests.

screens.title: SOPs
screens.purpose: Standard operating procedure documents with versioning.

screens.title: Trainings
screens.purpose: Training sessions and attendance roster.

screens.title: Talent pool
screens.purpose: Candidate talent pool.

screens.title: Payroll
screens.purpose: Monthly payroll runs: compute CNPS/IRPP/CAC/CFC/FNE, approve, post to the ledger.

screens.title: Assets
screens.purpose: Fixed-asset register with depreciation schedule, period posting and disposal.

screens.title: Journals
screens.purpose: General ledger journal entries (balanced-or-rejected, reversal-not-edit).

screens.title: Invoices
screens.purpose: Final invoices — revenue recognition, clears advance + débours.

screens.title: Credit notes
screens.purpose: Reverse a finalised invoice — draft then post the contra entry.

screens.title: Financing & debt
screens.purpose: Loans from banks/directors/third parties — engagements, drawdowns, repayments and outstanding balance.

screens.title: Receivables
screens.purpose: Smart receivables ledger — open items, ageing, reminders.

screens.title: Statements
screens.purpose: SYSCOHADA statements: trial balance, Bilan, Compte de résultat, TAFIRE.

screens.title: Tax center
screens.purpose: TVA return, IS/minimum tax, withholding declarations.

screens.title: Chart of accounts
screens.purpose: SYSCOHADA/OHADA chart of accounts — hierarchical, is_postable / requires_analytic.

screens.title: Proforma & advances
screens.purpose: Proforma and advance-payment invoices — advance posts to 4191, not revenue.
